title: Noronhia africana

This plant is a part of the genus Noronhia, which is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical regions of the world. The Oleaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the subfamily Oleoideae, which is one of the subfamilies to which Noronhia africana belongs. The classification of Noronhia africana is also based on its botanical characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower structure. Additionally, Noronhia africana is also classified as a species within the kingdom Plantae.
